name: Cal.com
short_desc: Open-source scheduling — booking pages, calendar sync, video integrations, and team round-robin.
author: Cal.com
description: Cal.com is the open-source Calendly alternative — a fully self-hostable scheduling platform with personal booking pages, two-way calendar sync (Google, Outlook, iCloud, CalDAV), video conferencing integrations (Zoom, Google Meet, Daily.co, Jitsi), and team / round-robin scheduling. This package bundles the Cal.com Community Edition with a dedicated Postgres 16 database. The full Cal.com codebase ships with some features gated behind an enterprise license (Insights, SAML, advanced Teams/Orgs) — those gracefully degrade on a self-hosted install with no license key required, and the core scheduling experience is fully open and works out of the box. Note: only `linux/amd64` is supported.

form_fields.label: NextAuth Secret
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated. Signs NextAuth session cookies. Rotating it logs every user out.

form_fields.label: Encryption Key
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated AES-256 key used to encrypt sensitive fields in the DB (calendar tokens, integration secrets). Don't rotate after first boot — encrypted data becomes unreadable.

form_fields.label: Postgres Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated password for the bundled Postgres `calcom` user.

form_fields.label: Default From Address
form_fields.hint: Email address that booking confirmation, reminder, and cancellation messages will be sent from. Configure SMTP below to actually deliver them.

form_fields.label: SMTP Host
form_fields.hint: Optional but strongly recommended — without SMTP, Cal.com can't send booking confirmations / reminders. Configure your provider here, or set up later in the admin UI.

form_fields.label: SMTP Username
form_fields.hint: SMTP login username (often the same as your sending address).

form_fields.label: SMTP Password
form_fields.hint: SMTP password or app-specific token (e.g. Gmail / Fastmail app password).

form_fields.label: Google API Credentials JSON
form_fields.hint: Optional — paste the JSON `installed`/`web` block from a Google Cloud OAuth client (Calendar + Meet scopes). Enables Google Calendar sync and Google Meet video for users who connect their Google account.

form_fields.label: Microsoft Graph Client ID
form_fields.hint: Optional — Azure AD app client ID for Office 365 / Outlook calendar integration.

form_fields.label: Microsoft Graph Client Secret
form_fields.hint: Companion secret for the Azure AD app above.

form_fields.label: Zoom Client ID
form_fields.hint: Optional — Zoom OAuth client ID for the Zoom video integration.

form_fields.label: Zoom Client Secret
form_fields.hint: Companion secret for the Zoom OAuth app above.
